chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.629 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection at A. 2. For hearing of case. 3. For hearing of MA No.10120/2025. 25.08.2025 Mr. Aadil Channa, Advocate for the applicants. ------------------------------- Learned counsel for the applicants submits that on instructions he does not press this lis and wants to withdraw the same. The same is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
